rule: Use topic-relevant images, not random category stock images.

preferredSources.productReview: Official product media page or original screenshot/photo.
preferredSources.movieReview: Official poster, official trailer still, studio media page, or original editorial graphic.
preferredSources.tvReview: Official show key art, official trailer still, network media page, or original editorial graphic.
preferredSources.news: Image directly related to the event, official statement page, press page, or original editorial graphic.
preferredSources.technology: Official product image, app screenshot, company press page, or original editorial graphic.
preferredSources.broadExplainer: Licensed stock or original editorial graphic is acceptable when no specific subject image is needed.

avoid: random stock image for a specific product, movie, show, person, or event
image that misleads readers about what is shown
